title: Attaching Email Chains in Documents Column
excerpt: I would love to be able to drag and drop an email chain as a reference in the documents tab. But anytime I try it only appears as a paperclip icon that no one else can view or open.

posts.author: Claire.Koopman (claire.koopman@bekins.us)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to be able to drag and drop an email chain as a reference in the documents tab. But anytime I try it only appears as a paperclip icon that no one else can view or open.
